title: data-tw screener-batch pack
description: Output of `pack.py --tickers <t1,t2,...> --pack screener-batch`. yfinance batch info+history (single subprocess each) plus per-ticker MOPS company_basic (Tier A). Used by `analysis-screener` and `report-screener-list`. No _partial flag at the top level — consumers should walk per-leaf _error fields.

info_batch.description: _action='info-batch'. Single yfinance subprocess for all tickers.

mops.description: Per-ticker MOPS company_basic, keyed by yfinance-style ticker (e.g. '2330.TW').
